THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, EMILIO J. ESQUIVEL, JORGE ESQUIVEL, MIDEY ESQUIVEL, VICTOR ESQUIVEL, CARLOS ESQUIVEL, MARVIN ESQUIVEL, ORLANDO HERNANDEZ, MARIA D. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 201 RANDALL STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, PLTF. ENTITLED TO RENTAL DAMAGES AGAINST THE ESQUIVELS FOR $4,520.00 STAYED UNTIL 7/5/94 AT 9AM. IF THE ESQUIVELS VACATE THE PREMISES BY 7/5/94 AT 9AM, PLTF. WILL FILE A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO THE MONEY JUDGMENT. SEE JUDGMENT FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
DECLARATION OF ERIC S. HAIMAN RE: AMENDED JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED CALIF. SAVINGS BANK,A CAL CORP
